reasoning: The bar_health_fill_v00 asset appears as a horizontal pink/white gradient bar composited in world space near the player character (visible in the brown tile area). The bar is approximately 220px wide and ~18px tall at this scene resolution. The player sprite appears to be roughly 50-60px wide, so the bar is about 3-4x the player width — notably wide for a health fill bar. For a HUD bar this would be fine, but placed in world space it reads oversized relative to the 32x32 player spec. The bar has a clean, flat pixel-art style consistent with the game's toy diorama aesthetic and does not overwhelm the scene visually. Perspective is top-down consistent. The pink fill with white highlight is visually readable. The main concern is that a health bar this wide in world space could feel disproportionate, though as a UI overlay element the scale is more forgivable. No severe perspective or style mismatch.
